name: @rozie-ui/command-palette

scripts.typecheck: echo 'meta-pkg: pure-Rozie source; the emitted leaves typecheck individually, the surface gate runs under vitest'

comment:combobox-devdep: D-07/Option B (P3): command-palette VENDORS @rozie-ui/combobox's .rozie source at codegen time (vendorPrimitives reads it via filesystem path, and the shipped leaves embed the compiled copy — so this is NOT a runtime dependency). It is a devDependency because the authoring/dev surface — the VR harness, the surface test, and the IDE LSP — compiles CommandPalette.rozie from raw source and must resolve the stable `<components>` specifier `@rozie-ui/combobox/Combobox.rozie` via node resolution against the primitive's `exports` map. Forward-compatible to Option A, where it graduates to a real dependency.
comment:headless-core-devdep: P3/D-06: the vendored Combobox imports @rozie-ui/headless-core/listCore.rzts (the shared resolver spine). That bare specifier must resolve from this package's location when codegen + the VR harness compile the vendored sibling, so headless-core is a devDependency too (the partial dissolves at compile — zero runtime dep).
